meta.tone: Warm, direct, gender-neutral. Never patronizing. No exclamation marks on result screens. No emoji.

guide.title: How to photograph
guide.step1_desc: Pour a urine sample into a clear cup and place it on a white surface
guide.step2_desc: Hold your phone 15-20 cm above the cup, camera pointing straight down
guide.step3_desc: Diffused daylight gives the best result. Do not use flash

camera.label:
Center the
cup here
camera.feedback_misaligned: Move slightly to center the cup

questions.title: Two quick questions
questions.subtitle: Helps improve accuracy. Optional.
questions.note_q2: Morning urine is more concentrated and gives more accurate results

result.disclaimer: For research use only. Experimental probability model. Not a substitute for medical testing.
result.label: Probability based on sample analysis
result.context_high: The analysis detects signs in the urine sample that may indicate pregnancy. A medical test will provide a definitive answer.
result.context_medium: The analysis is inconclusive. We recommend retesting in two days.
result.context_low: The analysis does not detect clear signs. This does not rule out pregnancy — timing and sample characteristics matter.
result.retest_when: We recommend retesting in two days
result.retest_why: As days pass, hormone levels change and the analysis becomes more accurate.

medical.how_body: The system analyzes the appearance of urine — color, turbidity, and hue — using a model trained on millions of samples. Hormonal changes during pregnancy affect visible urine characteristics.
next_steps: A blood hCG test is the most reliable confirmation
medical.urgent_body: Sharp abdominal pain, unusual bleeding, or severe dizziness — go to the emergency room.

help.title: Talk to someone
help.subtitle: Free and confidential lines.
help.footer: All services are free and confidential.

history.title: History
history.privacy: Everything is stored on device only.

settings.title: Settings
settings.auto_delete_desc: Photos are deleted immediately after analysis

global.disclaimer: For research use only. Experimental probability model. Not a substitute for medical testing.
global.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
global.error_camera: Camera access is needed. You can change this in settings.
